theory.canonical_statement: ID4179 records Coupled Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation.
theory.technical_interpretation: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `AI_Workspaces\00AllEdit\analysis_all_edit\all_edit_storyboard_generator_export.csv` for registry alignment and later derivation.

latex_blocks: \begin{equation} \hat{H}_{coupling} = \sum_{k,q} g_{k,q} \left( \h...",theoretical_physics,"a projection from 4D or higher dimensions. \subsection{Protocol Gamma: Quantum Acoustic Topology} At quantum level, phonons couple to magnetic quanta: \begin{equation} \hat{H}_{coupling} = \sum_{k,q} g_{k,q} \left( \hat{a}_k^\dagger \hat{b}_q + \hat{a}_k \hat{b}_q^\dagger \right) \end{equation}
